# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Deployment environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - staging
          - production
        default: staging

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      artifact-name: ${{ steps.set-artifact-name.outputs.name }}
      build-version: ${{ steps.set-version.outputs.version }}
      source-sha: ${{ steps.set-version.outputs.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Set build version
        id: set-version
        run: |
          VERSION="$(date +'%Y%m%d')-${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}-$(echo "${GITHUB_SHA}" | cut -c1-7)"
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "sha=${GITHUB_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Set artifact name
        id: set-artifact-name
        run: |
          ARTIFACT_NAME="build-artifacts-${{ steps.set-version.outputs.version }}"
          echo "name=${ARTIFACT_NAME}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@49933ea5288caeca8642d1e84afbd3f7d6820020 # v4.4.0
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Run security audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test --if-present

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ steps.set-version.outputs.version }}

      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > build-manifest.json <<EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.set-version.outputs.version }}",
            "commit_sha": "${GITHUB_SHA}",
            "branch": "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}",
            "build_number": "${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}",
            "build_id": "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}",
            "timestamp": "$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')",
            "repository": "${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}"
          }
          EOF
          cp build-manifest.json dist/ 2>/dev/null || cp build-manifest.json build/ 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Generate artifact checksum
        id: checksum
        run: |
          BUILD_DIR="dist"
          if [ ! -d "$BUILD_DIR" ]; then
            BUILD_DIR="build"
          fi
          find "${BUILD_DIR}" -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; | sort -k2 > checksums.sha256
          OVERALL_CHECKSUM=$(sha256sum checksums.sha256 | awk '{print $1}')
          echo "overall_checksum=${OVERALL_CHECKSUM}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          cp checksums.sha256 "${BUILD_DIR}/"

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4.6.2
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.set-artifact-name.outputs.name }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            build-manifest.json
            checksums.sha256
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scan
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@d3f86a106a0bac45b974a628896c90dbdf5c8093 # v4.3.0
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          if [ -f "./artifacts/checksums.sha256" ]; then
            echo "Verifying artifact checksums..."
            cd ./artifacts
            BUILD_DIR="dist"
            if [ ! -d "$BUILD_DIR" ]; then
              BUILD_DIR="build"
            fi
            find "${BUILD_DIR}" -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; | sort -k2 > checksums-verify.sha256
            if diff -q checksums.sha256 checksums-verify.sha256 > /dev/null 2>&1; then
              echo "✅ Artifact integrity verified"
            else
              echo "❌ Artifact integrity check failed"
              diff checksums.sha256 checksums-verify.sha256
              exit 1
            fi
          else
            echo "❌ No checksums file found"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Run security scan on artifacts
        run: |
          echo "Running security scan on build artifacts..."
          # Check for sensitive patterns in built artifacts
          SENSITIVE_PATTERNS=(
            "PRIVATE.KEY"
            "BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY"
            "BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY"
            "password\s*[:=]"
            "secret\s*[:=]"
            "api[_-]?key\s*[:=]"
            "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY"
          )
          FOUND_ISSUES=0
          for pattern in "${SENSITIVE_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            if grep -rl "${pattern}" ./artifacts/ 2>/dev/null; then
              echo "⚠️ Potential sensitive data found matching pattern: ${pattern}"
              FOUND_ISSUES=$((FOUND_ISSUES + 1))
            fi
          done
          if [ "$FOUND_ISSUES" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "❌ Security scan found ${FOUND_ISSUES} potential issues"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "✅ Security scan passed"

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    needs:
      - build
      - security-scan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/')
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
      deployments: write
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deployment-url }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-staging
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
            config/staging

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@d3f86a106a0bac45b974a628896c90dbdf5c8093 # v4.3.0
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -f "./artifacts/checksums.sha256" ]; then
            echo "❌ Checksums file missing"
            exit 1
          fi
          cd ./artifacts
          BUILD_DIR="dist"
          if [ ! -d "$BUILD_DIR" ]; then
            BUILD_DIR="build"
          fi
          find "${BUILD_DIR}" -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; | sort -k2 > checksums-verify.sha256
          if ! diff -q checksums.sha256 checksums-verify.sha256 > /dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "❌ Artifact integrity verification failed"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "✅ Artifact integrity verified"

      - name: Verify build manifest
        run: |
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit_sha' ./artifacts/build-manifest.json)
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.source-sha }}"
          if [ "${MANIFEST_SHA}" != "${EXPECTED_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "❌ Build manifest SHA mismatch: ${MANIFEST_SHA} != ${EXPECTED_SHA}"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "✅ Build manifest verified - SHA: ${MANIFEST_SHA}"

      - name: Configure cloud credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_STAGING_ROLE_ARN }}
          aws-region: ${{ vars.AWS_REGION || 'us-east-1' }}
          role-session-name: gha-deploy-staging-${{ github.run_id }}
          role-duration-seconds: 900

      - name: Deploy to staging
        id: deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          DEPLOY_TIMEOUT: "300"
        run: |
          echo "🚀 Deploying version ${BUILD_VERSION} to staging..."

          BUILD_DIR="./artifacts/dist"
          if [ ! -d "$BUILD_DIR" ]; then
            BUILD_DIR="./artifacts/build"
          fi

          if [ -f "./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x ./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh
            ./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh \
              --environment "${DEPLOY_ENV}" \
              --version "${BUILD_VERSION}" \
              --source "${BUILD_DIR}" \
              --timeout "${DEPLOY_TIMEOUT}"
          else
            echo "Deploying artifacts from ${BUILD_DIR}..."
            aws s3 sync "${BUILD_DIR}" "s3://${STAGING_BUCKET:-staging-deploy-bucket}/${BUILD_VERSION}/" \
              --delete \
              --no-progress \
              --sse AES256
            echo "✅ Artifacts uploaded to S3"
          fi

          echo "deployment-url=https://staging.example.com" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Verify staging deployment
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
        run: |
          echo "Verifying staging deployment..."
          MAX_RETRIES=10
          RETRY_INTERVAL=15
          HEALTH_URL="https://staging.example.com/health"

          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 "${HEALTH_URL}" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
            if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
              echo "✅ Staging deployment verified (attempt ${i}/${MAX_RETRIES})"
              exit 0
            fi
            echo "⏳ Health check returned ${HTTP_STATUS}, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s (${i}/${MAX_RETRIES})..."
            sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
          done

          echo "⚠️ Health check did not return 200 after ${MAX_RETRIES} attempts"
          echo "Proceeding with caution - manual verification recommended"

      - name: Staging deployment summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## Staging Deployment Summary" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Property | Value |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|----------|-------|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Version | ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Commit | ${{ needs.build.outputs.source-sha }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Environment | staging |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Status | ${{ job.status }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    needs:
      - build
      - security-scan
      - deploy-staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: |
      (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.environment == 'production') ||
      startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/')
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
      deployments: write
    environment:
      name: production
      url: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deployment-url }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-production
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
            config/production

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@d3f86a106a0bac45b974a628896c90dbdf5c8093 # v4.3.0
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -f "./artifacts/checksums.sha256" ]; then
            echo "❌ Checksums file missing"
            exit 1
          fi
          cd ./artifacts
          BUILD_DIR="dist"
          if [ ! -d "$BUILD_DIR" ]; then
            BUILD_DIR="build"
          fi
          find "${BUILD_DIR}" -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; | sort -k2 > checksums-verify.sha256
          if ! diff -q checksums.sha256 checksums-verify.sha256 > /dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "❌ Artifact integrity verification failed"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "✅ Artifact integrity verified"

      - name: Verify build manifest
        run: |
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit_sha' ./artifacts/build-manifest.json)
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.source-sha }}"
          if [ "${MANIFEST_SHA}" != "${EXPECTED_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "❌ Build manifest SHA mismatch"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "✅ Build manifest verified"

      - name: Configure cloud credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@ececac1a45f3b08a01d2dd070d28d111c5fe6722 # v4.1.0
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_PRODUCTION_ROLE_ARN }}
          aws-region: ${{ vars.AWS_REGION || 'us-east-1' }}
          role-session-name: gha-deploy-prod-${{ github.run_id }}
          role-duration-seconds: 900

      - name: Create pre-deployment backup
        env:
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
        run: |
          echo "Creating pre-deployment backup..."
          BACKUP_TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
          if [ -f "./scripts/deploy/backup.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x ./scripts/deploy/backup.sh
            ./scripts/deploy/backup.sh \
              --environment production \
              --backup-id "pre-${BUILD_VERSION}-${BACKUP_TIMESTAMP}"
          else
            echo "No backup script found, skipping backup step"
          fi

      - name: Deploy to production
        id: deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          DEPLOY_TIMEOUT: "600"
        run: |
          echo "🚀 Deploying version ${BUILD_VERSION} to production..."

          BUILD_DIR="./artifacts/dist"
          if [ ! -d "$BUILD_DIR" ]; then
            BUILD_DIR="./artifacts/build"
          fi

          if [ -f "./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x ./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh
            ./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh \
              --environment "${DEPLOY_ENV}" \
              --version "${BUILD_VERSION}" \
              --source "${BUILD_DIR}" \
              --timeout "${DEPLOY_TIMEOUT}" \
              --canary
          else
            echo "Deploying artifacts from ${BUILD_DIR}..."
            aws s3 sync "${BUILD_DIR}" "s3://${PRODUCTION_BUCKET:-production-deploy-bucket}/${BUILD_VERSION}/" \
              --delete \
              --no-progress \
              --sse AES256
            echo "✅ Artifacts uploaded to S3"
          fi

          echo "deployment-url=https://www.example.com" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Verify production deployment
        env:
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
        run: |
          echo "Verifying production deployment..."
          MAX_RETRIES=15
          RETRY_INTERVAL=20
          HEALTH_URL="https://www.example.com/health"

          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 "${HEALTH_URL}" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
            if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
              echo "✅ Production deployment verified (attempt ${i}/${MAX_RETRIES})"
              exit 0
            fi
            echo "⏳ Health check returned ${HTTP_STATUS}, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s (${i}/${MAX_RETRIES})..."
            sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
          done

          echo "❌ Production health check failed after ${MAX_RETRIES} attempts"
          exit 1

      - name: Rollback on failure
        if: failure()
        env:
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
        run: |
          echo "⚠️ Deployment failed, initiating rollback..."
          if [ -f "./scripts/deploy/rollback.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x ./scripts/deploy/rollback.sh
            ./scripts/deploy/rollback.sh \
              --environment production \
              --failed-version "${BUILD_VERSION}"
          else
            echo "No rollback script found - manual intervention required"
          fi

      - name: Production deployment summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## Production Deployment Summary" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Property | Value |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|----------|-------|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Version | ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Commit | ${{ needs.build.outputs.source-sha }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Environment | production |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Status | ${{ job.status }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Triggered by | ${{ github.actor }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup Artifacts
    needs:
      - build
      - deploy-staging
      - deploy-production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    permissions:
      actions: write
    steps:
      - name: Delete build artifacts
        uses: geekyeggo/delete-artifact@f275313e70c08f6120db482d7a6b98571786e5bb # v5.1.0
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          failOnError: false
